reason: Best-effort pattern (Rule D spirit): an optional/slow tool signal failing must be caught + logged, not propagate to fail the whole flow. searchMemberCommits must never throw.

Vector findNearest index requirements + query scope: the query uses .collection(...) (COLLECTION scope) so the firestore.indexes.json entry must be queryScope COLLECTION, not COLLECTION_GROUP. Index deploy is the user's job (Rule note).
Use structured logger.warn for the swallowed search failure (repoId, memberId, err).
v2-only, region, no forbidden patterns; keep the existing assignTools structure.
